series_metadata.series_title: State Advisory Panel for Exceptional Children (SAPEC)
series_metadata.series_description: Includes minutes of meetings, published notice and annual report issued by state advisory council, which is operated in accordance with the requirements of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for ten(10) years then reviewed by review by State Archives before disposal ; Electronic: Retain for ten(10) years then reviewed by review by State Archives before disposal, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
